instruction: This credit card icon needs a yellow price tag added back in the bottom-right (rect x=84, y=96, 28x14, fill #fde047, stroke #222, stroke-width 1).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/credit-card.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M2.25 8.25h19.5M2.25 9h19.5m-16.5 5.25h6m-6 2.25h3m-3.75 3h15a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25-2.25V6.75A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 19.5 4.5h-15a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25 2.25v10.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 4.5 19.5Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/credit-card.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M2.25 8.25h19.5M2.25 9h19.5m-16.5 5.25h6m-6 2.25h3m-3.75 3h15a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25-2.25V6.75A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 19.5 4.5h-15a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25 2.25v10.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 4.5 19.5Z"/></g>
  <rect id="price-tag" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="84" y="96" width="28" height="14" />
</svg>
